title: Commissioned armed forces officers
rationale: Decision-making and leadership are less influenced by LLMs.

title: Non-commissioned armed forces officers
rationale: Operational roles with limited text-based tasks.

title: Armed forces occupations, other ranks
rationale: Primarily physical and tactical roles.

title: Chief executives, senior officials and legislators
rationale: High reliance on strategic planning and communication.

title: Administrative and commercial managers
rationale: Involves significant administrative and communication tasks.

title: Production and specialised services managers
rationale: Requires specialized knowledge but some planning is text-based.

title: Hospitality, retail and other services managers
rationale: Customer interaction limits full LLM exposure.

title: Science and engineering professionals
rationale: Involves research and data analysis, areas where LLMs excel.

title: Health professionals
rationale: Patient interaction limits full LLM exposure.

title: Teaching professionals
rationale: Educational content creation can be enhanced by LLMs.

title: Business and administration professionals
rationale: Involves significant data analysis and report generation.

title: Information and communications technology professionals
rationale: Highly reliant on coding and data manipulation.

title: Legal, social and cultural professionals
rationale: Involves legal research and documentation.

title: Science and engineering associate professionals
rationale: Technical support roles can benefit from LLMs.

title: Health associate professionals
rationale: Patient care limits full LLM exposure.

title: Business and administration associate professionals
rationale: Involves data management and administrative tasks.

title: Legal, social, cultural and related associate professionals
rationale: Involves research and documentation.

title: Information and communications technicians
rationale: Technical troubleshooting can be enhanced by LLMs.

title: General and keyboard clerks
rationale: Involves data entry and document processing.

title: Customer services clerks
rationale: Customer interaction can be partially automated.

title: Numerical and material recording clerks
rationale: Involves data recording and processing tasks.

title: Other clerical support workers
rationale: Involves routine clerical tasks.

title: Personal service workers
rationale: Requires personal interaction and service.

title: Sales workers
rationale: Sales require personal interaction and negotiation.

title: Personal care workers
rationale: Hands-on care limits LLM exposure.

title: Protective services workers
rationale: Security roles are primarily physical.

title: Market-oriented skilled agricultural workers
rationale: Primarily outdoor and physical work.

title: Market-oriented skilled forestry, fishery and hunting workers
rationale: Primarily outdoor and physical work.

title: Subsistence farmers, fishers, hunters and gatherers
rationale: Entirely physical and unpredictable work.

title: Building and related trades workers, excluding electricians
rationale: Primarily physical and hands-on work.

title: Metal, machinery and related trades workers
rationale: Involves skilled manual tasks.

title: Handicraft and printing workers
rationale: Some design tasks can be supported by LLMs.

title: Electrical and electronic trades workers
rationale: Technical documentation can be enhanced by LLMs.

title: Food processing, wood working, garment and other craft and related trades workers
rationale: Involves skilled manual tasks.

title: Stationary plant and machine operators
rationale: Machine operation is primarily physical.

title: Assemblers
rationale: Involves repetitive manual tasks.

title: Drivers and mobile plant operators
rationale: Driving and operation are physical tasks.

title: Cleaners and helpers
rationale: Primarily physical and manual work.

title: Agricultural, forestry and fishery labourers
rationale: Entirely physical and outdoor work.

title: Labourers in mining, construction, manufacturing and transport
rationale: Entirely physical and manual work.

title: Food preparation assistants
rationale: Involves manual food preparation tasks.

title: Street and related sales and service workers
rationale: Involves personal interaction and sales.

title: Refuse workers and other elementary workers
rationale: Entirely physical and manual work.
